level.setting: Victorian alchemy laboratory overgrown with bioluminescent fungus

pickup.name: Silver Solvent
pickup.effect: Increases damage against metallic entities

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Husk triggers the security lockdown on the main door leading to the atrium

pickup.name: Crystallized Moonlight
pickup.effect: Solidifies spectral forms

encounters.trigger: Repairing the generator with parts dropped by the Construct unlocks the basement catacombs

pickup.name: Ancient Mercury Essence
pickup.effect: Causes severe instability in magical constructs

encounters.trigger: Clearing the shadows reveals the secret entrance to the Alchemist's Sanctum

boss.name: The Corrupted Grand Alchemist
boss.victory_condition: Infuse the boss with the Ancient Mercury Essence before the final ritual finishes

level.objective: Purify the laboratory by neutralizing the corrupted alchemist

level.setting: an abandoned, rotting asylum engulfed in eternal fog

pickup.name: canister of high-pressure oxygen
pickup.effect: increases flamethrower range and damage by 10

encounters.trigger: killing the ghoul causes a pipe to burst, revealing a staircase to the boiler room

pickup.name: holy oil canister
pickup.effect: coats the flamethrower fuel to burn supernatural entities

encounters.trigger: the wraith's death shatters the floor, exposing the path to the ritual chamber

pickup.name: ancient sigil stone
pickup.effect: reveals the true form of the final boss

encounters.trigger: the sentinel's collapse illuminates the altar, summoning the ancient entity

boss.name: The Architect of Decay
boss.victory_condition: must use the sigil stone to pierce the boss's invulnerability before using the flamethrower

level.objective: cleanse the asylum by burning the source of the corruption

pickup.name: consecrated salt
pickup.effect: adds burning damage to physical strikes

encounters.trigger: unlocks the heavy rusted gate to the infirmary

pickup.name: silver locket
pickup.effect: attracts and confuses ethereal entities

encounters.trigger: reveals a hidden key inside the creature's chest cavity

pickup.name: obsidian shard
pickup.effect: amplifies shadowblade critical hit damage

encounters.trigger: opens the iron cellar doors where the master resides

boss.name: the Void Matriarch
boss.victory_condition: shatter the shard within the Matriarch's core to banish her to the void

level.objective: exorcise the asylum by purging the Matriarch

pickup.name: Bottled Will-o'-Wisp
pickup.effect: illuminates dark paths and exposes spectral weaknesses

encounters.trigger: Entering the gate triggers the ghoul and opens the path to the inner ruins

pickup.name: Cursed Iron Key
pickup.effect: unlocks the ritual chamber containing the boss

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel clears the debris blocking the path to the ritual chamber

pickup.name: Ethereal Oil
pickup.effect: makes weapons effective against eldritch armor

encounters.trigger: Stabbing the Bone Weaver with the key drains its shield, forcing it to retreat to the Boss Arena

boss.name: The Grave Warden
boss.victory_condition: Apply Ethereal Oil to the bow to pierce the Warden's spectral heart

level.objective: Escape the desolate graveyard by defeating the Grave Warden and breaking the curse

pickup.name: Spirit Essence Vial
pickup.effect: Allows the player to perceive hidden ethereal conduits.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the orderly drops a key to the Surgical Wing.

pickup.name: Silver Surgeon Scalpel
pickup.effect: Increases damage against undead constructs.

encounters.trigger: Clearing the wing reveals a secret passage leading to the crypts.

pickup.name: Obsidian Seal
pickup.effect: Vulnerable point on the final boss.

encounters.trigger: The Warden guards the vault door to the Grand Mausoleum boss arena.

boss.name: The Architect of Decay
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Obsidian Seal into the Architect's heart during its recovery phase.

level.objective: Purify the asylum by destroying the Architect of Decay.
level.reward: The ability to summon the spirits of the defeated enemies as permanent thralls.

level.setting: a decaying, shifting asylum where gravity fluctuates

pickup.name: Stabilizing Serum
pickup.effect: Reduces incoming damage by 50 percent for 30 seconds

encounters.trigger: Defeating the abomination causes the floor to tilt toward the laboratory wing

pickup.name: Ignited Fuel Canister
pickup.effect: Increases cleaver damage output by 50 for the next combat

encounters.trigger: Extracting the fuel canister forces the basement containment doors to shatter

pickup.name: Ancient Void Key
pickup.effect: Reveals the boss heart weakness

encounters.trigger: Obtaining the key unlocks the main sacrificial altar room

boss.name: The Architect of Chaos
boss.victory_condition: Strike the exposed heart during the void cycle

level.objective: Escape the asylum by destroying the source of the temporal instability

level.setting: An abandoned, mist-covered Victorian botanical garden at twilight

pickup.name: Bottled Moonlight
pickup.effect: Enhances light output to blind spectral entities

encounters.trigger: Opening the main atrium door triggers the next area

pickup.name: Ancient Rusty Key
pickup.effect: Opens the inner sanctum of the greenhouse

encounters.trigger: Defeating the wraith unlocks the path to the inner vault

pickup.name: Petrified Rose
pickup.effect: Attracts the boss to a specific focal point

encounters.trigger: Finding the key reveals the central chamber door

boss.name: The Arboretum Mother
boss.victory_condition: Place the rose on the central altar to wither her form

level.objective: Cleanse the garden of the encroaching spectral corruption
level.reward: The Warden's Eternal Peace and restoration of the garden

level.setting: An enchanted, decaying toy workshop floating in a void of candy-colored fog

encounters.hazard: Flickering floor tiles that drop players into a ball pit

pickup.name: Glowing Gear
pickup.effect: Increases spell casting speed

encounters.trigger: Defeating the clown winds up the toy train, opening the path to the Storeroom

encounters.hazard: Sticky spider silk that slows movement

pickup.name: Silver Chime
pickup.effect: Stuns spectral enemies for 3 seconds

encounters.trigger: Clearing the spiders causes the storeroom walls to shift into a corridor leading to the Loom

encounters.hazard: Haunted strings that dangle from the ceiling trying to trip the player

pickup.name: Heart of the Workshop
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to boss fear status

encounters.trigger: Destroying the puppet causes the Loom to unravel, revealing the stairway to the Boss Observatory

boss.name: The Toymaker's Shadow
boss.victory_condition: Use the Heart of the Workshop to materialize the boss fully and shatter its illusion

level.objective: Restore order to the workshop by banishing the shadow controlling the toys
level.reward: The ability to manifest infinite illusions of oneself foraged trinkets

pickup.name: Coolant Vial
pickup.effect: lowers enemy core temperature

encounters.trigger: destroying the automaton releases a steam valve that reveals the path to the main hall

pickup.name: Conductive Copper Wire
pickup.effect: shorts out electrified machinery

encounters.trigger: the sprite drops a keycard when defeated which grants entry to the command bridge

pickup.name: Master Override Cog
pickup.effect: stops the main mechanism

encounters.trigger: the guardian collapse triggers the emergency shutdown of the cathedral's core engine

boss.name: The Architect
boss.victory_condition: successfully insert the Master Override Cog into the central console while dodging the Architect's attacks

level.objective: stabilize the cathedral's failing core before the entire mechanism self-destructs
level.reward: A prototype gear-integrated mechanical prosthetic arm

level.setting: A decaying clockwork observatory suspended in a smog-choked void

pickup.name: Conductive Oil
pickup.effect: Enhances weapon conductivity for electrical strikes

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the Foyer gear activates the lift to the Gear Chamber

pickup.name: Magnetic Anchor
pickup.effect: Allows player to pull heavy objects or rip armor

encounters.trigger: Stripping the armor of the Automaton reveals the access hatch to the Telescope Deck

pickup.name: Celestial Lens
pickup.effect: Focuses light into a concentrated heat ray

encounters.trigger: Calibrating the telescope with the Lens initiates the boss encounter

boss.name: Prime Chronos-Core
boss.victory_condition: Overload the core by focusing the Lens during a temporal distortion

level.objective: Restart the Great Orrery to clear the toxic smog from the city below
level.reward: Master Artificer blueprints and an augmented Aetheric Wrench

pickup.name: Quick-Dissolve Catalyst
pickup.effect: Increases acid damage for the next encounter

encounters.trigger: Defeating the bot activates the pressurized door to the Boiler Room

pickup.name: Conductive Copper Wire
pickup.effect: Allows the player to create electrical traps

encounters.trigger: Stopping the spider triggers the elevator to the Clock Tower

pickup.name: Grand Chronometer Key
pickup.effect: Used to access the main boss chamber

encounters.trigger: Turning the key unlocks the Observatory Dome

boss.name: The Grand Clockmaker
boss.victory_condition: Use the key to freeze the clockwork mechanism holding the boss together

level.objective: Restore the flow of time by defeating the Grand Clockmaker

pickup.name: wrench of containment
pickup.effect: seals steam pipes and dampens kinetic energy

encounters.trigger: shutting down the central steam valve triggers the alarm system in the ventilation shaft

pickup.name: super-conductive lubricant
pickup.effect: temporarily freezes mechanical joints

encounters.trigger: disabling the fan blades reveals the path to the main power core

pickup.name: arc-fuse core
pickup.effect: destabilizes high-voltage boss machinery

encounters.trigger: extracting the arc-fuse core overloads the main power source and summons the boss

boss.name: The Grand Clockmaker
boss.victory_condition: successfully slot the arc-fuse core into the clockmaker's exoskeleton to neutralize his steam supply

level.objective: sabotage the Grand Clockmaker's central power hub
level.reward: the master gear of the ancients

level.setting: a rain-slicked industrial clocktower suspended in a perpetual lightning storm

pickup.name: Copper Conductive Coil
pickup.effect: increases lightning discharge radius

encounters.trigger: destroying the Sentry unlocks the blast doors to the Boiler Room

pickup.name: Insulated Rubber Seal
pickup.effect: grants immunity to electrical backlash

encounters.trigger: defeating the Construct vents the pressure, clearing the staircase to the Zenith

encounters.hazard: unstable electrical arcs jumping between floor tiles

pickup.name: Stabilization Core
pickup.effect: dampens the boss's internal storm energy

encounters.trigger: claiming the Core initiates the bridge sequence to the Boss Platform

boss.name: The Storm-Engine Titan
boss.victory_condition: force the Titan to overload its core by applying the Stabilization Core

level.objective: deactivate the Titan to stop the city-wide lightning storm

level.setting: a desolate, fog-choked clockwork industrial wasteland

pickup.name: Brass Gear Wrench
pickup.effect: Used to jam mechanical joints

encounters.trigger: Defeating the automaton opens the heavy pressure gate to the Gear Works.

pickup.name: Concentrated Aether Vial
pickup.effect: Temporarily freezes time for mechanical entities

encounters.trigger: Saboteur death reveals a hidden elevator to the Main Spire.

pickup.name: Temporal Anchor
pickup.effect: Nullifies temporal distortions

encounters.trigger: Securing the anchor deactivates the boss shield.

boss.name: Lord Cogsworth
boss.victory_condition: Stabilize the main engine room before the city implodes

level.objective: Prevent the city's main clock from winding down into eternal stasis

level.setting: A decaying, smog-choked clockwork foundry beneath the city of Gear-Haven, filled with shifting steam pipes and grinding copper gears.

encounters.hazard: Pressurized venting steam causing constant chip damage

pickup.name: Magnetic Flux Coil
pickup.effect: Temporarily disables electronic shields

encounters.trigger: Destroying the automaton triggers the release of the heavy pressure lock to the Forge Floor.

encounters.hazard: Molten iron pools that restrict movement

pickup.name: Refined Quartz Lens
pickup.effect: Refracts concentrated energy beams

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the spider causes the foundry's main core to spin, opening the path to the control room.

encounters.hazard: Swinging pendulum blades with instant-kill potential

pickup.name: Overclocking Gear
pickup.effect: Massively boosts weapon output for a single strike

encounters.trigger: The sabotage of the control room causes the floor to collapse into the Boss Arena.

boss.name: The Steam-Lord Architect
boss.victory_condition: Channel the overclocked energy through the Scepter to shatter the Architect's central pressure vessel.

level.objective: Deactivate the core pressure valves to prevent the city above from being leveled by a massive steam explosion.
level.reward: The Architect's blueprint for eternal geothermal energy.

level.setting: a quiet, clockwork garden suspended in the clouds

pickup.name: Oil Canister
pickup.effect: can be used to lubricate frozen mechanisms or enemies

encounters.trigger: destroying the automaton activates the bridge to the fountain

pickup.name: Pressure Valve Handle
pickup.effect: shuts off high-pressure steam pipes

encounters.trigger: the sprite's explosion reveals a path to the workshop

pickup.name: Master Key
pickup.effect: unlocks the main core chamber

encounters.trigger: the sentry drops the Master Key upon defeat

boss.name: The Great Chronos Golem
boss.victory_condition: insert the Master Key into the golem's heart-core

level.objective: restore the peace of the clockwork garden
